name: grey-ridge-base-onchain
title: Grey Ridge — Base On-Chain Data Proxy
description: Query Base mainnet on-chain data — gas price, block number, wallet ETH balance, and ERC-20 token balances. Powered by Grey Ridge Signals' x402 data API. No API key needed. $0.001/run via Apify's x402 integration.

secretsSchema.description: No API keys or secrets required — all queries use free preview endpoints and public RPCs.
